visuals.title: Bidirectional RNN Architecture
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Bidirectional RNNs</text>
  
  <!-- Forward RNN Layer -->
  <rect x="80" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="130" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Forward RNN
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Backward RNN Layer -->
  <rect x="240" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Backward RNN
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Input Sequence -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="100" y="150" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="150" y="150" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="200" y="150" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="250" y="150" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="300" y="150" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Output Layer -->
  <rect x="160" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Output
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Forward Arrow -->
  <path d="M130 150 L130 125 L180 125 L180 80" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="180,80 185,85 180,90" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Backward Arrow -->
  <path d="M290 150 L290 125 L240 125 L240 80" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="240,80 235,85 240,90" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Output Connections -->
  <path d="M130 120 L130 100 L210 100 L210 230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M290 120 L290 100 L210 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
